title: Yosys only instantiates bram correctly if it is read into a verilog output register

features.name: 2d_unpacked_array_memory_read_to_local_reg
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array memory with a read operation inside a clocked always block, where the read result is assigned to a local reg variable (non-output) rather than an output port

features.name: memory_read_with_wire_index_in_clock_domain
features.description: Code should include a memory array read where the index uses a wire (computed value) rather than a registered value, inside a clocked always block
features.snippet:
wire [9:0] x_next = x + 1;
always @(posedge clk) pixel <= memory[x_next][y_next];
